chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 06 of 2009 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.3171/2021 25-06-2021 Applicant / Surety Dur Muhammad, present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / surety has filed this application for return of surety on the ground that the applicants / accused, who were granted protective bail for a period of one week by this Court vide order dated 06-01-2009, have been acquitted of the charge by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I, Ghotki vide judgment dated 06-02-2017; copy of said judgment is placed on record. Office endorsement also affirms the same. Learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State accords no objection to the grant of this application. Accordingly, present application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
